text:
Daemon (デモン, Demon) is a member of the Heil-Ly Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 378 

Appearance

Daemon is a tall man with slanted eyes. He has long, slicked-back hair and wears a long-sleeved black shirt with light-colored pants. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 393 

Personality

From his reaction to Luini's death, Daemon seems extremely calm and collected. Exclaiming that it was a bummer that Luini died. Like other Heil-Ly members, Daemon has sadistic tendencies and no qualms about killing people, calling them "prey". 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Daemon is seen with the other Heil-Ly members as Morena uses her Contagion on them one at a time and explains how her Nen ability works. 

After Nobunaga kills Luini, several Heil-Ly members look at the bottom half of Luini's corpse up against a nearby wall in their hideout. It's stated that Daemon (level 20) is a construction worker. He points out how much Luini's loss will affect them since he allowed them to hunt for prey from the hideout. A professional gamer named Gelato (level 19) adds how dangerous it will be now since the military is on high alert. An investigator's assistant named Perigord (level 18) suggests that someone should recreate Luini's ability. An arcade employee named Bille (level 20) says that he has already decided on his ability. Perigord reminds them that Morena said everyone has an innate type, confident that Luini was an Emitter. Bille replies that an Emitter needs to do the job, but Gelato points out that they need to figure out how to raise their levels so they can reach level 21. An Emitter and human trafficker named Voconte (level 26) suggests using his "door" ability to catch prey that wander into the trap, adding that they have ways to reel them in. 

Near a pile of corpses in the Heil-Ly secret hideout's processing room, Daemon, along with Quorolle and Tevelares, test their new Nen powers. Quorolle expresses excitement at how cool reaching level 51 is, and the trio get ready to hunt the other mafia. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 405 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Daemon is implied to have reached Level 51 with Contagion and is visibly seen with an increased aura amount and output. Having crossed Contagion 's Level 20 mark, he also obtained a Nen ability, which remains unknown.
